title: Unit Price Calculator
shortDescription: Find the price per unit from a total cost and quantity, then compare packs, sizes, and offers with clear results.
metaDescription: Find the price per unit from cost and quantity, then compare packs, sizes, and offers with clear results.
intro: Calculate price per unit by dividing total cost by quantity, so you can compare offers on the same basis.
overview:
Use this calculator to turn a total price and a quantity into a clear unit price. It helps when products are sold in different pack sizes, weights, volumes, or counts and you want a like-for-like comparison.

Enter the total cost and the number of units, and the tool returns the price for one unit. This makes it easier to spot whether a larger pack is truly cheaper or just looks cheaper at first glance.
howItWorks: Enter the total cost and the quantity.
The calculator divides cost by quantity to get a unit price.
Compare the result against other offers or pack sizes.

useCases.title: Compare two grocery packs
useCases.description: Check which cereal box, rice bag, or yogurt pack gives the lower cost per gram, litre, or item.

useCases.title: Review supplier quotes
useCases.description: Compare bulk prices for screws, paper, cleaning supplies, or raw materials using the same unit basis.

useCases.title: Judge subscription bundles
useCases.description: Work out the cost per seat, per month, or per feature when vendors sell different package sizes.

examples.title: Price per kilogram
examples.description: Shows how to convert a pack price into a kilogram rate for easy comparison.

examples.title: Price per litre
examples.description: Useful when two bottles have different volumes but you want the same unit basis.

examples.title: Price per item
examples.description: Helps compare multipacks, office supplies, or hardware sold by count.

faq.question: What if my quantity is in grams or millilitres?
faq.answer: Convert to the unit you want to compare first, or enter the quantity in that same unit so the result matches your comparison target.

faq.question: Can I compare packs with different sizes directly?
faq.answer: Yes, as long as both results are converted to the same unit. For example, compare both packs per kilogram or per litre.

faq.question: Why does my result look smaller than the shelf label?
faq.answer: Some labels show the total pack price, not the unit price. This calculator shows the cost for one unit of the measure you entered.

faq.question: What mistake causes the wrong result most often?
faq.answer: Using the wrong quantity unit, such as entering 750 when the comparison should be per litre instead of per millilitre, will change the result.

seo.title: Unit Price Calculator
